<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. A few quick reminders:

- PRs target `dev`, not `main`. main rolls up from dev periodically.
- One scope per PR. If you found an unrelated fix, file a follow-up issue.
- Tests are not optional except for pure docs / config / DNS work — say so
  explicitly below if that is the case.
- For UI string changes, update all 20 i18n locale files in this PR (not
  later). The lint rule rejects raw English in JSX.
- For SECURITY issues, do NOT open a PR or issue here. See SECURITY.md.
-->
